H4900.strongs_def: to draw, used in a great variety of applications (including to sow, to sound, to prolong, to develop, to march, to remove, to delay, to be tall, etc.)
H4900.kjv_def: draw (along, out), continue, defer, extend, forbear, [idiom] give, handle, make (pro-, sound) long, [idiom] sow, scatter, stretch out.

H4902.derivation: the same in form as H4901 (מֶשֶׁךְ), but probably of foreign derivation;
H4902.strongs_def: Meshek, a son of Japheth, and the people descended from him

H4904.strongs_def: a bed (figuratively, a bier); abstractly, sleep; by euphemism, carnal intercourse

H4906.strongs_def: a figure (carved on stone, the wall, or any object); figuratively, imagination

H4908.strongs_def: a residence (including a shepherd's hut, the lair of animals, figuratively, the grave; also the Temple); specifically, the Tabernacle (properly, its wooden walls)
H4908.usage: tabernacle(119x), dwelling(9x), habitation(5x), dwellingplaces(3x), place(1x), dwelleth(1x), tents(1x)

H4910.kjv_def: (have, make to have) dominion, governor, [idiom] indeed, reign, (bear, cause to, have) rule(-ing, -r), have power.
H4910.usage: rule(38x), ruler(19x), reign(8x), dominion(7x), governor(4x), power(2x), indeed(1x)

H4911.strongs_def: to liken, i.e. (transitively) to use figurative language (an allegory, adage, song or the like); intransitively, to resemble
H4911.kjv_def: be(-come) like, compare, use (as a) proverb, speak (in proverbs), utter.
H4911.usage: like(5x), proverb(4x), speak(2x), use(2x), become(1x), compare(1x), utter(1x)

H4912.derivation: apparently from H4910 (מָשַׁל) in some original sense of superiority in mental action;
H4912.strongs_def: properly, a pithy maxim, usually of metaphorical nature; hence, a simile (as an adage, poem, discourse)

H4916.derivation: or מִשְׁלֹחַ; also מִשְׁלָח; from H7971 (שָׁלַח);
H4916.strongs_def: a sending out, i.e. (abstractly) presentation (favorable), or seizure (unfavorable); also (concretely) a place of dismissal, or a business to be discharged
H4916.kjv_def: to lay, to put, sending (forth), to set.

H4917.strongs_def: a mission, i.e. (abstractly and favorable) release, or (concretely and unfavorable) an army

H4918.strongs_def: Meshullam, the name of seventeen Israelites

H4920.derivation: or מְשֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ; from H7999 (שָׁלַם) and H3050 (יָהּ); ally of Jah;

H4924.strongs_def: fat, i.e. (literally and abstractly) fatness; but usually (figuratively and concretely) a rich dish, a fertile field, a robust man

H4927.strongs_def: Mishma, the name of a son of Ishmael, and of an Israelite

H4928.strongs_def: audience, i.e. the royal court; also obedience, i.e. (concretely) a subject

H4929.strongs_def: a guard (the man, the post or the prison); a deposit (figuratively); also (as observed) a usage (abstractly), or an example (concretely)
H4929.kjv_def: diligence, guard, office, prison, ward, watch.
H4929.usage: ward(12x), watch(4x), guard(3x), diligence(1x), offices(1x), prison(1x)

H4931.strongs_def: watch, i.e. the act (custody), or (concretely) the sentry, the post; objectively preservation, or (concretely) safe; figuratively observance, i.e. (abstractly) duty or (objectively) a usage or party
H4931.kjv_def: charge, keep, or to be kept, office, ordinace, safeguard, ward, watch.
H4931.usage: charge(50x), ward(9x), watch(7x), keep(7x), ordinance(3x), offices(1x), safeguard(1x)

H4932.strongs_def: properly, a repetition, i.e. a duplicate (copy of a document), or a double (in amount); by implication, a second (in order, rank, age, quality or location)
H4932.kjv_def: college, copy, double, fatlings, next, second (order), twice as much.
H4932.usage: second(11x), double(8x), next(7x), college(2x), copy(2x), twice(2x), fatlings(1x), much(1x)

H4934.strongs_def: a hollow, i.e. a narrow passage

H4937.strongs_def: a support (concretely), i.e. (figuratively) a protector or sustenance

H4938.strongs_def: support (abstractly), i.e. (figuratively) sustenance or (concretely) a walking-stick

H4940.strongs_def: a family, i.e. circle of relatives; figuratively, a class (of persons), a species (of animals) or sort (of things); by extension a tribe or people

H4941.strongs_def: properly, a verdict (favorable or unfavorable) pronounced judicially, especially a sentence or formal decree (human or (participant's) divine law, individual or collective), including the act, the place, the suit, the crime, and the penalty; abstractly, justice, including a participant's right or privilege (statutory or customary), or even a style
H4941.kjv_def: [phrase] adversary, ceremony, charge, [idiom] crime, custom, desert, determination, discretion, disposing, due, fashion, form, to be judged, judgment, just(-ice, -ly), (manner of) law(-ful), manner, measure, (due) order, ordinance, right, sentence, usest, [idiom] worthy, [phrase] wrong.
H4941.usage: judgment(296x), manner(38x), right(18x), cause(12x), ordinance(11x), lawful(7x), order(5x), worthy(3x), fashion(3x), custom(2x), discretion(2x), law(2x), measure(2x), sentence(2x)

H4943.derivation: from an unused root meaning to hold;

H4945.strongs_def: properly, causing to drink, i.e. a butler; by implication (intransitively), drink (itself); figuratively, a well-watered region
H4945.kjv_def: butler(-ship), cupbearer, drink(-ing), fat pasture, watered.

H4947.derivation: from H8259 (שָׁקַף) in its original sense of overhanging;

H4949.derivation: or מִשְׁקֹלֶת; feminine of H4948 (מִשְׁקָל) or H4947 (מַשְׁקוֹף);
H4949.strongs_def: a weight, i.e. a plummet (with line attached)

H4950.strongs_def: a settling place (of water), i.e. a pond

H4952.derivation: from H8281 (שָׁרָה) in the sense of loosening;

H4953.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8319 (שָׁרַק);

H4954.derivation: patrial from an unused noun from an unused root; probably meaning to stretch out; extension;
H4954.strongs_def: a Mishraite, or inhabitant (collectively) of Mishra

H4955.strongs_def: combustion, i.e. cremation (of a corpse), or calcination (of lime)

H4956.derivation: from the plural of H4955 (מִשְׂרָפָה) and H4325 (מַיִם); burnings of water;

H4957.derivation: a form for H7796 (שׂוֹרֵק) used denominatively; vineyard;

H4958.derivation: apparently from an unused root meaning to perforate, i.e. hollow out;

H4959.strongs_def: to feel of; by implication, to grope

H4960.strongs_def: drink, by implication, drinking (the act); also (by implication) a banquet or (generally) feast

H4962.strongs_def: properly, an adult (as of full length); by implication, a man (only in the plural)
H4962.usage: men(14x), few(2x), friends(1x), number(1x), persons(1x), small(1x), with(1x)

H4964.derivation: from an unused root meaning to curb;

H4965.derivation: from H4964 (מֶתֶג) and H520 (אַמָּה) with the art. interposed; bit of the metropolis;

H4967.derivation: from H4962 (מַת) and H410 (אֵל), with the relative interposed; man who (is) of God;

H4968.derivation: from H4962 (מַת) and H7973 (שֶׁלַח); man of a dart;

H4970.derivation: from an unused root meaning to extend;
H4970.strongs_def: properly, extent (of time); but used only adverbially (especially with other particle prefixes), when (either relative or interrogative)

H4971.derivation: or מַתְכֻנֶת; from H8505 (תָּכַן) in the transferred sense of measuring;

H4973.strongs_def: properly, a biter, i.e. a tooth

H4975.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be slender;
H4975.strongs_def: properly, the waist or small of the back; only in plural the loins

H4977.strongs_def: Mattan, the name of a priest of Baal, and of an Israelite

H4978.strongs_def: {a present; specifically (in a good sense), a sacrificial offering, (in a bad sense) a bribe}

H4979.strongs_def: a present; specifically (in a good sense), a sacrificial offering, (in a bad sense) a bribe

H4980.strongs_def: Mattanah, a place in the Desert

H4981.derivation: probably patrial from an unused noun meaning slenderness;
H4981.strongs_def: a Mithnite, or inhabitant of Methen

H4982.strongs_def: Mattenai, the name of three Israelites

H4983.derivation: or מַתַּנְיָהוּ; from H4976 (מַתָּן) and H3050 (יָהּ); gift of Jah;
H4983.strongs_def: Mattanjah, the name of ten Israelites

H4985.strongs_def: to suck, by implication, to relish, or (intransitively) be sweet

H4989.strongs_def: Mithkah, a place in the Desert

H4990.strongs_def: Mithredath, the name of two Persians

H4993.derivation: or מַתִּתְיָהוּ; from H4991 (מַתָּת) and H3050 (יָהּ); gift of Jah;
H4993.strongs_def: Mattithjah, the name of four Israelites

H4994.derivation: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered;
H4994.strongs_def: 'I pray', 'now', or 'then'; added mostly to verbs (in the Imperative or Future), or to interjections, occasionally to an adverb or conjunction
H4994.kjv_def: I beseech (pray) thee (you), go to, now, oh.

H4995.derivation: apparently from H5106 (נוּא) in the sense of harshness from refusal;

H4996.strongs_def: No (i.e. Thebes), the capital of Upper Egypt

H4997.derivation: or נאוֹדlemma נֹאוד vowel, corrected to נאוֹדxlit nôʼwd corrected to nʼôwd; also (feminine) נֹאדָה; from an unused root of uncertain signification;

H4998.strongs_def: properly, to be at home, i.e. (by implication) to be pleasant (or suitable), i.e. beautiful
